domain: Sami yoik (Sápmi indigenous wordless vocal song; melody+rhythm carry meaning rather than text; yoik conjures subject; pre-linguistic vocal channel)
specific_mechanism: Wordless vocal channel carrying meaning via prosody+melody+rhythm directly, independent of word/text content.
llm_application: YOIK-PROSODY-GATE: a wordless pre-token prosody context channel. Alongside the text input X_text, the model receives a second non-text channel X_prosody = {f0_contour(t), duration(t), energy(t)} extracted from a demonstration speech sample (no transcription needed). X_prosody is fed via CROSS-ATTENTION into intermediate text-layer hidden states and GATES the generation distribution conditioned on prosody alone. The gate is WORD-BOUNDARY-INDEPENDENT — prosody features are time-continuous, not aligned to tokens. Differs from ProsodyLM (word-level prosody tokens ON TOP of text) by (a) NO transcription step, (b) NO word alignment, (c) time-continuous prosody-only channel acting as PRE-TOKEN GATE on text generation.
novelty_claim: ProsodyLM uses word-aligned prosody-token sequences (text + prosody-token co-modeled). VocalNet uses tokenized speech with multi-token prediction. ProsodyFlow uses prosody latent for TTS output. YOIK-PROSODY-GATE differs by (a) WORDLESS pre-token, (b) NO transcription dependency, (c) TIME-CONTINUOUS feature stream, (d) cross-attention GATE on text generation. Provides language-agnostic prosody conditioning.
